assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.subtitle: Choose an assessment to begin.
assessment.localFirstNote: Core-only: scores stay on device — no Firebase on this screen.
assessment.homeRadarHint: Radar and overall average are shown on Home.

ffmi.title: FFMI (body-fat axis)
ffmi.body: Use profile + body fat to calculate FFMI and update the body-fat axis.

cardio.title: Cardio (Cooper / 5 km)
cardio.body: Use Cooper distance or 5 km time to calculate cardio score.

muscle.title: Muscle mass (SMM)
muscle.body: Enter skeletal muscle mass (SMM) to calculate your muscle-axis score.

explosive.title: Explosive power (jump / sprint)
explosive.body: Enter at least one metric: vertical jump, standing long jump, or sprint.

strength.title: Five-lift strength (DOTS-based)
strength.body: Enter weight and reps for the five lifts, then calculate and save to radar.

grip.title: Grip strength
grip.body: Enter peak grip (kg) to calculate grip-axis score.

armSize.title: Arm size assessment
armSize.body: Enter arm circumference and body fat to calculate arm leaderboard score.
